50.reason: [The traversal order in 'input' is post-order (left, right, then current), but the problem requires left-to-right leaf output which corresponds to in-order traversal. This causes leaves to be printed in incorrect order. Additionally, if the tree is empty (p == NULL), this function will dereference a null pointer.]
